title: ‘Uncover what’s really going on’: UFO researcher in Manitoba supports AI tracking
description: The group's 2025 analysis, released Monday, includes data taken from observation stations set up by passionate UFO enthusiasts across the country.

title: Canada’s top UFO researcher in Manitoba supports AI tracking
description: Chris Rutkowski, a top UFO expert in Canada, says that artificial intelligence will make it easier to identify if a UFO sighting is a bird, plane, or something unidentifiable. He

title: UFO researcher in Manitoba supports using AI tracking to 'uncover what's really going on'
description: Artificial intelligence is going to make it easier to spot whether a bird, a plane or an otherworldly creature is in the sky, Canada's top UFO expert says, as Canadians continue to report sightings of unidentified flying objects.
